DISCOVERY, 302, PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL CODE-COMPLAINT RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND DOCUMENT REQUEST WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, AND TO APPEAR FOR ORAL DEPOSITION, IS GRANTED. ALL WRITTEN RESPONSES SHALL BE SERVED WITHIN FIFTEEN DAYS OF THE DATE OF SERVICE OF THIS ORDER WITH NOTICE OF ENTRY. PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION SHALL BE HELD WITHIN THIRTY DAYS OF SERVICE OF SAID ORDER. calendar.matters:
Motion To Compel Defendant Alexey Verein To Provide Answers Ot Interrogatories; And Responses To Request For Produciton Of Document;And To Appear For Deposition With Documents;And For Sanctionss
Off Calendar Jul-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's unopposed motion to compel code-complaint responses to interrogatories and document request without objections, and to appear for oral deposition, is granted. All written responses shall be served within fifteen days of the date of service of this order with Notice of Entry. Plaintiff's deposition shall be held within thirty days of service of said Order. Sanction in the sum of $750.00 shall be paid by defendant within the aforesaid thirty days. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Alexey Verein To Provide Answers To Interrogatories;And Responses To Request For Production Of Documents;And To Appear For Deposition With Documents;And For Sanctionsot
Off Calendar Jul-15-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TONY LAU's Motion To Compel Defendant Alexey Verein To Provide Answers To Interrogatories, and Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, and To Appear For Deposition With Documents and For Sanctions is taken off calendar as a duplicate entry. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported.

Motion To Compel Defendant Alexey Verein To Provide Answers Ot Interrogatories; And Responses To Request For Produciton Of Document;And To Appear For Deposition With Documents;And For Sanctionss
Off Calendar Jun-30-2015 Continued To Jul-15-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted the tentative rulings as follows: 1) PLAINTIFF TONY LAU'S Motion To Compel Defendant Alexey Verein To Provide Answers to Interrogatories; And Responses To Request For Production Of Document; And To Appear For Deposition With Documents; And For Sanctions and 2) PLAINTIFF TONY LAU'S Motion To Compel Defendant Alexey Verein To Provide Answers To Interrogatories; And Responses To Request For Production Of Documents; And To Appear For Deposition With Documents; And For Sanctions are continued to July 15, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 302. Counsel for the moving party is admonished to read and comply with local rules. Courtesy copies of the moving papers were not provided to Department 302, a violation of Local Rule 2.6. In the meantime, counsel is directed to immediately furnish courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Van Zandt. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
